description: Developer with over 3 years of professional experience in designing and building web applications and systems for clients. Experienced in frontend development, Docker deployments, and mentoring junior developers and interns. Focused on continuous improvement, with an interest in taking on roles of greater technical responsibility where I can contribute to the growth and performance of the team.
projects_description: I've worked on a variety of projects, from simple websites to complex web applications.
contact_description: Want to chat? Just <email>send me an email with a question</email> and I'll respond whenever I can.
